pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT (val_bpb 1.1253)

output.summary: Parallel Muon banking + batched Newton-Schulz and LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP3× feed a gated GQA stack before legal score-first TTT fine-tuning with sliding-window scoring.
techniques: Parallel Muon parameter banking with batched Newton-Schulz solver
LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP3× plus SmearGate/Gated Attention/GQA architecture
Legal score-first TTT with sliding-window scoring before SGD fine-tune
